pickaxe.name: Pickaxe
pickaxe.description: A sturdy pick for breaking ore from rock.

fishing_rod.name: Fishing Rod
fishing_rod.description: A simple rod and line for river fishing.

copper_ore.name: Copper Ore
copper_ore.description: A lump of soft, greenish copper ore.

iron_ore.name: Iron Ore
iron_ore.description: Heavy rust-red ore, ready for the furnace.

coal.name: Coal
coal.description: Black fuel-stone that burns long and hot.

mithril_ore.name: Mithril Ore
mithril_ore.description: A faintly blue ore, light as a whisper.

oak_logs.name: Oak Logs
oak_logs.description: Dense oak timber, prized by carpenters.

bronze_bar.name: Bronze Bar
bronze_bar.description: A smelted bar of workable bronze.

iron_bar.name: Iron Bar
iron_bar.description: A solid bar of refined iron.

rope.name: Coil of Rope
rope.description: Fifty feet of hemp. Carried, it makes any climb kinder.

climbing_picks.name: Climbing Picks
climbing_picks.description: Iron claws for hands and boots — the rock face relents.

regional_map.name: Regional Map
regional_map.description: A charcoal map of the district. Reading it fixes every settlement in your memory.

explorers_chart.name: Explorer's Chart
explorers_chart.description: A master cartographer's survey — the whole realm, drawn true.

arcane_dust.name: Arcane Dust
arcane_dust.description: Glittering residue of raw magic, the base of every enchantment.

mana_crystal.name: Mana Crystal
mana_crystal.description: A crystal humming with stored magic.

ember_core.name: Ember Core
ember_core.description: A cinder that never cools — the heart of fire magic.

frost_shard.name: Frost Shard
frost_shard.description: Ice that never melts, keen with cold.

shadow_essence.name: Shadow Essence
shadow_essence.description: Coiled darkness, cold to the touch.

vital_root.name: Vital Root
vital_root.description: A root that pulses with life, prized by enchanters of restoration.
